title: Outstanding Loan Growth in China Hits Another New Low
section_path: Outstanding Loan Growth in China Hits Another New Low
section_path_text: Outstanding Loan Growth in China Hits Another New Low
summary:
Main
By Jeffrey Landsberg
As we discussed in Commodore Research's most recent Weekly China Report, outstanding loan growth in China in March fell to 5.7%. This has marked yet another record low. Image reference: Chart 1.jpg | assets/2026-04-30_outstanding-loan-growth-in-china-hits-another-new-low_img_chart1_789d3dade4b2.jpg
As we have discussed often in our work, with China's housing market remaining inundated with a huge amount of excess supply already available, Chinese banks are continuing to have difficulty in actually having lendees to lend to in the construction market.
